pany is willing to bond it form

In other words, Mr.. Taxpayer,
100000 represents what your good
and great representatives in the
city council have given Of your
property, your wealth, for you are
the body polite, to this grasping
gas monopoly.


Remember the figures, Mr.. Tax
payer, for this question Of giving
away franchises to Water Power
company, Traction company and
Gas company is becoming a mat
ter of terrible importance not alone
in Spokane, but the nation over.


The rights you have given the
gas company for not a farthlng are
worth 100000 in the eyes of a
bonding company.


And if you wanted municipal
ownership tomorrow you would
have to pay that amount to get
back your own.


Think of this every time in the
future that your honorable city
government gives a street, a bridge,
public right to these public serv-
ice corporations-that it is out of
your pocket they are filching thou
sands these franchises are worth.


MAKE THOSE COUNCILMFN
BE HONEST WITH YOU OR PUT
THEM OUT. MAKE THEM
CHARGE FOR THESE FRAN
CHISES - EVERY ONE OF
THEM FROM THIS DAY FOR
WARD.
